headline: Visa shares slip as banks reportedly consider acquiring Fiserv debit network (V)
summary: Payment stocks decline following reports of bank discussionsVisa (NYSE:V) shares fell 2. 3% in premarket trading on Tuesday, while Mastercard (NYSE:MA) declined 1.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Capital One Financial, Lowers Price Target to $253
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Moshe Orenbuch   maintains Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $260 to $253.

headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Capital One Financial, Raises Price Target to $275
summary: UBS  analyst Erika Najarian   maintains Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) with a Buy and raises the price target from $270 to $275.

headline: JPM, BofA Eye Payments Deal — Why JPMorgan, Bank Of America And Other Banks Want Fiserv’s Debit Network
summary: Wall Street's biggest banks reportedly held preliminary talks to acquire a Fiserv network that could help them bypass federal debit-card fee caps.
